word: G2997 - λάσχω - láschō - las'-kho - Burst asunder

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A strengthened form of a primary verb, which only occurs in this and another prolonged form as an alternate in certain tenses; to crack open (from a fall): - burst asunder.
